text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My muscles are screaming, and the sweat is
flowing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yup, haha! I felt really good out there today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But everyone else really did amazing too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When I thought I was gonna lose bad, that just
got me really fired up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So I dashed ahead with all my strength and
managed to place!
choice_data_list: That was a really strong run.

We're gonna train even harder—you won't lose
next time!

We're gonna train even harder—you won't lose
next time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So I dashed ahead with all my strength and
managed to place!
choice_data_list: That was a really strong run.

We're gonna train even harder—you won't lose
next time!

We're gonna train even harder—you won't lose
next time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Now that's what I like to hear, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I was able to run exactly how I wanted to
out there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's got me pumped! Let's train even harder so I
get first place next time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's just like you said—I need to get
tougher...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Now that that's settled... it's time to hit the bench
press and get ripped!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Praise be to the power of IRON!
